name: whitespace_basic
grammar:
ROOT <- ITEM (',' ITEM)*
ITEM <- WORD / PHRASE
WORD <- < [a-zA-Z0-9_]+ >
PHRASE <- < '"' (!"\"" .)* '"' >
%whitespace <- [ \t\r\n]*

name: whitespace_with_subrules
grammar:
ROOT <- ITEM (',' ITEM)*
ITEM <- '[' < [a-zA-Z0-9_]+ > ']'
%whitespace <- (SPACE / TAB)*
SPACE <- ' '
TAB <- '\t'

name: whitespace_inside_token_boundary
description: Whitespace is NOT skipped inside token boundary operator

name: whitespace_outside_token_boundary
description: Whitespace IS skipped outside token boundary

name: whitespace_in_string_literal
description: Whitespace inside string quotes is preserved
grammar:
StrQuot <- < '"' < (StrEscape / StrChars)* > '"' >
StrEscape <- '\\' any
StrChars <- (!"\"" !'\\' any)+
any <- .
%whitespace <- [ \t]*

name: word_expression
description: %word ensures word boundaries between keyword-like tokens

name: word_expression_prioritized_choice
description: %word with keyword checking via prioritized choice

name: word_expression_mixed_case_syntax_error
description: Dictionary with mixed case-sensitivity is a syntax error
